name: Caesar Salad with Fennel and Red Pepper
recipeIngredient: 1 small head romaine lettuce, leaves torn into bite-size pieces
1 red bell pepper, seeded, deveined and thinly sliced
4 anchovy fillets, rinsed and dried, minced
recipeInstructions:
Nuts add a crouton-like crunch, and crisp vegetables add extra flavor to this unique yet straightforward version from "Season to Taste," by Jeanette Ferrary and Louise Fiszer (Simon and Schuster, 1988). In a large salad bowl, combine lettuce, fennel, red pepper, and walnuts. In a small bowl, mix the remaining ingredients until well blended. Pour over the salad and toss well.
Makes 6 servings.
